steps.title: Substitute the worker count
steps.content:
The colony has $43$ worker ants, and $43$ is within the model's range. Substitute $x=43$ into the equation.

$$y=0.68(43)+3.1$$

steps.title: Find the predicted larvae
steps.content: Evaluate the expression to estimate the number of larvae. $$y=29.24+3.1$$ $$y=32.34$$ The closest listed value is $32$. The answer is A.
